test_cases.title: createTracker registers all Pi event listeners and tool
test_cases.description: Verify createTracker(pi, config) registers pi.on for tool_call, turn_end, session_start, session_tree, before_agent_start, and pi.registerTool with correct name
steps: Call createTracker with mock pi object and skillExecutionConfig

test_cases.title: Skill SKILL.md read triggers TrackedItem creation
test_cases.description: When AI reads a file ending with SKILL.md, a TrackedItem is created with status=loaded and steering is injected
steps: Emit tool_call event with toolName='read', path='/path/to/my-skill/SKILL.md'
Assert created item has name='my-skill', status='loaded'

test_cases.title: Non-SKILL.md read does not trigger tracking
test_cases.description: Reading a regular file should not create a TrackedItem
steps: Emit tool_call event with toolName='read', path='/path/to/config.json'

test_cases.title: State transition loaded→completed succeeds
test_cases.description: Calling skill_state(action=update, id=N, status=completed) transitions item from loaded to completed
steps: Call tool execute with action='update', id=N, status='completed'

test_cases.title: State transition from terminal state fails
test_cases.description: Attempting to update a completed item returns error
steps: Call tool execute with action='update', id=N, status='error'

test_cases.title: Error accumulation triggers forced recording steering
test_cases.description: After errorCount reaches threshold, onError steering is injected
steps: Assert pi.sendUserMessage called with errorForceRecord content

test_cases.title: Session restore filters terminal items
test_cases.description: reconstructState from entries containing completed items only restores non-terminal ones
steps: Create entries with 2 items: one completed, one loaded
Trigger session_start event with mock ctx containing these entries
Assert runtime state has 1 item (the loaded one)

test_cases.title: Session restore reads old skill-state-tracker entries
test_cases.description: Backward compatibility: old entryType 'skill-state-tracker' is recognized and parsed
steps: Create entry with customType='skill-state-tracker', data containing items with skillMdPath field
Assert items restored with metadata.skillMdPath populated

test_cases.title: Reminder steering injected after remindInterval turns
test_cases.description: Non-terminal items receive onRemind steering after remindInterval turns
steps: Emit turn_end events until currentTurnIndex >= remindInterval (10)
Assert pi.sendUserMessage called with onRemind content

test_cases.title: tracker.py extracts stats from sessions with tracker entries
test_cases.description: Python extractor correctly groups and computes tracker statistics
steps: Create mock session with evolve-tracker-skill entry containing items
Assert result contains total_items > 0, completed_rate, error_rate
Assert samples array has items with session_id, trigger_context

test_cases.title: tracker.py returns empty stats when no tracker entries
test_cases.description: Sessions without tracker entries produce empty result
steps: Create mock session with no evolve-tracker entries

test_cases.title: Existing detectors unaffected by tracker integration
test_cases.description: All existing evolve-daily detectors continue working after tracker integration

test_cases.title: skill-state package removed
test_cases.description: Verify packages/skill-state/ directory no longer exists
